content.en:
As time passed, the number of divine medicines in the medicine garden became smaller and smaller, and they were gradually picked up by the true monarchs.

Soon, the last magic medicine also fell into the hands of the True Monarchs, and the battle for the medicine garden came to an end temporarily, but it was not really over.

Whew!!!

A true gentleman flew towards the outside world, seemingly unprepared to explore the rest of the dojo.

There must be more opportunities and treasures inside the dojo, but these True Monarchs dare not continue to explore, for fear that if they fight, they will become cannon fodder.

This time, they have obtained some miracle medicines, and they are already very satisfied.

Therefore, they are in a hurry to get out of here.

However, they underestimated the greed of the other True Monarchs.

After these True Monarchs left, another group of powerful True Monarchs and those True Monarchs also went out.

Obviously, these powerful True Monarchs have their eyes on the magic medicine on these True Monarchs and want to hunt down these True Monarchs.

A fight is coming!

Ye Tian and several other half-step True Ancestors disdained to hunt down other True Monarchs, otherwise if they spread the word, their reputation would be affected.

Besides, they have obtained a large number of miracle medicines, and there is no shortage of miracle medicines, so there is no need to snatch them anymore.

If he really didn't care about his identity, Ye Tian would not have agreed to share the magic medicine before, but chose to directly occupy the medicine garden.

Obviously, there are many True Monarchs who will fall.

"I obtained 29,588 magic pills this time, which is a little less than expected!" Ye Tian checked his magic medicine and said secretly.

Originally, he estimated that he would be able to obtain more than 30,000 divine medicines, but that was the most ideal result.

But in fact, as more and more True Monarchs poured into the Medicine Garden, he naturally didn't have so many divine medicines.

Of course, 29,588 strains of divine medicine are already a huge fortune, far more than the entire worth of ordinary true ancestors, and some poor Dao ancestors may not ignore this wealth.

"The biggest opportunity is inside the dojo, no matter how precious the divine medicine is, it only shortens the cultivation time, and it can't make people promote to True Ancestor or Dao Ancestor!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

There were not a few True Monarchs who had the same idea as Ye Tian, and these True Monarchs also set their sights on the internal area of the dojo.

The medicine garden is located inside the dojo, and there is a passage that leads directly to the rest of the dojo, but the medicine garden is an important place after all, so it is still divided by prohibition.

If you want to enter other areas, you must break the ban, otherwise you won't be able to enter other areas of the dojo at all.

The prohibition between the medicine garden and other areas is far inferior to the dojo defense formation on the periphery of the dojo, but the prohibition here is not too weak.

Even after the passage of time, and the fact that there is no one to manage the dojo, the dojo ban has been weakened a little, but it has not weakened much.

Rumble!!!

Luohai Zhenjun and several other half-step True Ancestors tried to attack the prohibition, but they did not break the prohibition.

At this time, the faces of several half-step True Ancestors and many True Monarchs changed.

If they can't break the ban, they won't be able to enter the dojo, and they won't be able to get opportunities in the dojo.

The dojo in the ruins of the battlefield was either intact and could not be entered at all, or it was destroyed, and the chances and treasures inside had long been swept away by the original battle winner.

There are not many dojos like this that only crack a spatial crack and are generally intact.

This is an opportunity to obtain the inheritance of the Dao Ancestor, and it would be a pity if you couldn't even grasp such an opportunity!

Seeing this, Ye Tian also stepped forward to attack the ban, trying to open the passage to other areas of the dojo, but after attacking, he couldn't break the ban.

He estimated that even if he went all out and cooperated with other true monarchs to make a move, he would not be able to break the ban.

The dojo is the territory of the Dao Ancestor, and the prohibitions here are all arranged by the Dao Ancestor, and non-true monarchs can break it.

The True Monarchs pondered for a while, and now there are only two ways.

One is to ask the true monarchs who are good at prohibiting the formation to try to crack the formation, this method may not work, after all, this is the formation arranged by the Dao Ancestor, even if the Dao Ancestor is not good at the prohibition, it is difficult to crack.

The second is to find the pass token of the dojo, there must be more than one Dao Ancestor inside the dojo, there must be other disciples or servants, for example, there are disciples or servants who need to manage the medicine garden, and there must be a pass token, otherwise there is no way to come in, is it possible to ask Dao Zu to open the ban every time?

It can be said that as long as there is a passtoken, the ban can be opened.

When the Great War began, the people of this dojo must have been involved, and even tried to escape, so there were definitely people who fell to the outside world.

So such passtokens will definitely be able to find several, but it will take luck.

Of course, such a pass token can only open the prohibition in the general area of the dojo, and in some more secret places, the pass token is also useless.

Then, as long as the ban here can be opened, it will be enough!

Time passed little by little, and a Ming Zhenjun left, but Ye Tian and several other half-step True Ancestors did not leave.

"Wanfa Daozi, can't the prohibition here be opened, won't Daozi leave?" asked Luohai Zhenjun.

"There should be someone who gets the pass token here, I might as well wait, I really can't leave again!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Okay!"

Luohai Zhenjun nodded slightly and stopped asking.

One day!

Two days!

Three days!

......

In the blink of an eye, a month has passed.

However, several half-step True Ancestors still didn't leave, but instead another half-step True Ancestor came, and it didn't seem to be ready to leave.

At this moment, Luohai Zhenjun couldn't help it.

"That's it, everyone, I have a pass token on me, which should be able to open the ban here and enter other areas of the dojo!"

Luohai Zhenjun spoke.

"Luohai Zhenjun, you can really bear it, it seems that you want us all to leave, so that we can enter the other areas of the dojo alone!" the other half-step True Ancestor sneered.

Luohai Zhenjun didn't respond, but he did have this idea.

It's a pity that many people don't leave at all, and they have to wait here, otherwise, he won't reveal the pass token in his hand.

After all, his time is also precious, and he doesn't want to waste it.

Immediately, Luo Haizhen took out the pass token.

Rumble!

The pass token controls the ban and easily opens the ban.

Brush!!!

Luohai Zhenjun was the first to enter, and the others followed.

When everyone enters, they come to an unfamiliar environment.

There were buildings here, and they stood on the fertile ground, with the medicine garden behind them.

At this moment, a voice resounded in everyone's ears, making everyone's expressions change.

"Hello, outsiders!"
